2026-04-21T05:20:12.1700287Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1700823Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1701253Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1701616Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1702114Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1702355Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1702512Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T05:20:12.1703083Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1703280Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1703565Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T05:20:12.1703822Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

{"timestamp":"2026-04-21T05:23:46.512406181Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## Documentation Gap\n\n**Package:** `Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding`\n**Service directory:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\n**Triggered by:** PR #58166 (commit `10f785b`) by @yungshinlintw\n\n## What Changed\n\nPR #58166 added two new public APIs in version 1.1.0:\n\n1. **`AnalyzeUsageDetails` class + `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` extension method** — surfaces billing and token-consumption details (document page counts, contextualization tokens, per-model LLM/embedding token breakdown) from a completed analyze operation.\n2. **`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` class** — supports creating a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration`, enabling configuration-file-based credential resolution and ASP.NET Core dependency injection registration.\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- The README **Examples section** lists samples but does not mention the new `GetUsage()` / usage/billing tracking capability (covered in `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md` but not surfaced in the README).\n- The README **Key concepts** and **Authenticate the client** sections do not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` or IConfiguration-based setup.\n- The README **Examples section** does not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`/configuration-based client construction.\n- There is no standalone sample file (`.md` / `.cs`) for `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` — no equivalent of the other `SampleXX_*.md` files exists for this feature.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify README.md\n\n**File:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md`  \n**Action:** Edit\n\n**1a. Add `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` to the \"Authenticate the client\" section**\n\nAfter the existing `#### Using API key` subsection, add a new subsection:\n\n````markdown\n#### Using IConfiguration (ASP.NET Core / dependency injection)\n\n`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` supports loading client configuration — endpoint and credentials — from `IConfiguration`, which is the recommended pattern for ASP.NET Core applications.\n\n```C# Snippet:ContentUnderstandingCreateClientFromSettings\n// In your appsettings.json:\n// {\n//   \"ContentUnderstanding\": {\n//     \"Endpoint\": \"https://\u003cyour-resource\u003e.services.ai.azure.com/\"\n//   }\n// }\nIConfiguration configuration = new ConfigurationBuilder()\n    .AddJsonFile(\"appsettings.json\")\n    .Build();\n\nvar settings = new ContentUnderstandingClientSettings();\nsettings.Bind(configuration.GetSection(\"ContentUnderstanding\"));\nvar client = new ContentUnderstandingClient(settings);\n```\n````\n\n**1b. Add a bullet for usage/billing tracking in the Examples section**\n\nInside the `## Examples` → bullet list, append:\n\n```markdown\n* **Usage and billing details** - Retrieve token consumption, document page counts, and per-model LLM/embedding usage after a completed analyze operation using `GetUsage()`\n* **Configuration-based client creation** - Create a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration` using `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` for ASP.NET Core dependency injection scenarios\n```\n\n**1c. Update the \"Next steps\" section** to reference the new sample:\n\n```markdown\n* [Sample 16: Get usage/billing details][sample16] — Retrieve `AnalyzeUsageDetails` from a completed analyze operation\n```\n\nAdd the corresponding footnote at the bottom of the README where the other `[sampleXX]` links are defined:\n\n```markdown\n[sample16]: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/samples/Sample16_GetUsage.md\n```\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\n#### Snippet A: ContentUnderstandingClientSettings (new test file)\n\nCreate a new test sample file at:  \n`sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/tests/samples/Sample16_GetUsage.cs`\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\n#nullable enable\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure;\nusing Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding;\nusing Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.Tests;\nusing Azure.Core.TestFramework;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.Samples\n{\n    public partial class ContentUnderstandingSamples\n    {\n        [RecordedTest]\n        public async Task GetUsageDetailsAsync()\n        {\n            string endpoint = TestEnvironment.Endpoint;\n            var options = InstrumentClientOptions(new ContentUnderstandingClientOptions());\n            var client = InstrumentClient(new ContentUnderstandingClient(new Uri(endpoint), TestEnvironment.Credential, options));\n\n            Uri invoiceUrl = new Uri(\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Azure-Samples/azure-ai-content-understanding-dotnet/main/ContentUnderstanding.Common/data/invoice.pdf\");\n            Operation\u003cAnalysisResult\u003e operation = await client.AnalyzeAsync(\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\n                \"prebuilt-invoice\",\n                inputs: new[] { new AnalysisInput { Uri = invoiceUrl } });\n\n            #region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage\n            // Get usage details (token consumption, page counts) from the completed operation.\n            AnalyzeUsageDetails? usage = operation.GetUsage();\n            if (usage != null)\n            {\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Document pages (standard): {usage.DocumentPagesStandard}\");\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Contextualization tokens: {usage.ContextualizationTokens}\");\n                foreach (var kvp in usage.Tokens)\n                {\n                    Console.WriteLine($\"  {kvp.Key}: {kvp.Value}\");\n                }\n            }\n            #endregion\n\n#if !SNIPPET\n            if (Mode != RecordedTestMode.Playback)\n            {\n                Assert.IsNotNull(usage, \"Usage details should be available after a completed analysis\");\n                Assert.IsNotNull(usage!.Tokens, \"Tokens dictionary should not be null\");\n            }\n#endif\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Snippet name:** `ContentUnderstandingGetUsage`\n\n**README placeholder location:** In the new `Sample16_GetUsage.md` (see Step 3 below), place it after the introductory prose.\n\n#### Snippet B: ContentUnderstandingClientSettings\n\nAdd a `#region Snippet:ContentUnderstandingCreateClientFromSettings` / `#endregion` block to the same `Sample16_GetUsage.cs` file (or a new `Sample17_CreateClientFromSettings.cs`), showing how to instantiate a client from `IConfiguration`. Then add a matching placeholder in the README as described in Step 1a above.\n\n### Step 3: Create new sample markdown file\n\n**File:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/samples/Sample16_GetUsage.md`  \n**Action:** Create\n\n````markdown\n# Sample 16: Get usage and billing details\n\nAfter an analyze operation completes, you can retrieve usage details that describe the resources consumed — including document page counts, contextualization tokens, and per-model LLM/embedding token breakdown.\n\n## Get usage details\n\nCall `GetUsage()` on the completed `Operation\u003cAnalysisResult\u003e` to obtain an `AnalyzeUsageDetails` instance:\n\n```C# Snippet:ContentUnderstandingGetUsage\n// Get usage details (token consumption, page counts) from the completed operation.\nAnalyzeUsageDetails? usage = operation.GetUsage();\nif (usage != null)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"Document pages (standard): {usage.DocumentPagesStandard}\");\n    Console.WriteLine($\"Contextualization tokens: {usage.ContextualizationTokens}\");\n    foreach (var kvp in usage.Tokens)\n    {\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  {kvp.Key}: {kvp.Value}\");\n    }\n}\n```\n\nThe `AnalyzeUsageDetails` object exposes:\n\n| Property | Description |\n|---|---|\n| `DocumentPagesMinimal` | Pages processed at minimal level |\n| `DocumentPagesBasic` | Pages processed at basic level |\n| `DocumentPagesStandard` | Pages processed at standard level |\n| `AudioHours` | Hours of audio processed |\n| `VideoHours` | Hours of video processed |\n| `ContextualizationTokens` | Tokens used for context preparation, confidence scoring, and output formatting |\n| `Tokens` | Per-model LLM/embedding token counts (e.g., `\"gpt-4.1-input\"`, `\"gpt-4.1-output\"`) |\n````\n\n### Step 4: Validate\n\nRun these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next.\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 contentunderstanding` — confirm README and sample markdown files are updated correctly (check git diff)\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 contentunderstanding` — no public API changes are expected; verify no diff\n5. `dotnet format sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","title":"[ContentUnderstanding] Docs: README missing coverage of GetUsage() and ContentUnderstandingClientSettings (1.1.0)"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

2026-04-21T05:23:59.8964735Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965009Z **Package:** `Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding`
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965242Z **Service directory:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/`
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965403Z **Triggered by:** PR #58166 (commit `10f785b`) by @yungshinlintw
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965413Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965488Z ## What Changed
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965492Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965619Z PR #58166 added two new public APIs in version 1.1.0:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8965623Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8966698Z 1. **`AnalyzeUsageDetails` class + `AnalyzeOperationExtensions.GetUsage()` extension method** — surfaces billing and token-consumption details (document page counts, contextualization tokens, per-model LLM/embedding token breakdown) from a completed analyze operation.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8967617Z 2. **`ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` class** — supports creating a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration`, enabling configuration-file-based credential resolution and ASP.NET Core dependency injection registration.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8967630Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8967703Z ## Gaps Found
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8967707Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8968445Z - The README **Examples section** lists samples but does not mention the new `GetUsage()` / usage/billing tracking capability (covered in `Sample03_AnalyzeInvoice.md` but not surfaced in the README).
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8969041Z - The README **Key concepts** and **Authenticate the client** sections do not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` or IConfiguration-based setup.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8969438Z - The README **Examples section** does not mention `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings`/configuration-based client construction.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970049Z - There is no standalone sample file (`.md` / `.cs`) for `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` — no equivalent of the other `SampleXX_*.md` files exists for this feature.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970054Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970131Z <details>
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970344Z <summary><strong>📐 Implementation Guide</strong></summary>
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970356Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970682Z This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970694Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970782Z ### Step 1: Modify README.md
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8970786Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971004Z **File:** `sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/README.md`  
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971078Z **Action:** Edit
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971082Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971338Z **1a. Add `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` to the "Authenticate the client" section**
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971342Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971526Z After the existing `#### Using API key` subsection, add a new subsection:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971530Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971607Z ````markdown
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971765Z #### Using IConfiguration (ASP.NET Core / dependency injection)
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8971769Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972511Z `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` supports loading client configuration — endpoint and credentials — from `IConfiguration`, which is the recommended pattern for ASP.NET Core applications.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972516Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972682Z ```C# Snippet:ContentUnderstandingCreateClientFromSettings
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972776Z // In your appsettings.json:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972843Z // {
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8972936Z //   "ContentUnderstanding": {
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973101Z //     "Endpoint": "https://<your-resource>.services.ai.azure.com/"
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973168Z //   }
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973238Z // }
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973388Z IConfiguration configuration = new ConfigurationBuilder()
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973486Z     .AddJsonFile("appsettings.json")
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973558Z     .Build();
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973563Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973713Z var settings = new ContentUnderstandingClientSettings();
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8973889Z settings.Bind(configuration.GetSection("ContentUnderstanding"));
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974154Z var client = new ContentUnderstandingClient(settings);
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974223Z ```
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974293Z ````
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974298Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974467Z **1b. Add a bullet for usage/billing tracking in the Examples section**
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974479Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974645Z Inside the `## Examples` → bullet list, append:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974649Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8974719Z ```markdown
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8975252Z * **Usage and billing details** - Retrieve token consumption, document page counts, and per-model LLM/embedding usage after a completed analyze operation using `GetUsage()`
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8975880Z * **Configuration-based client creation** - Create a `ContentUnderstandingClient` from `IConfiguration` using `ContentUnderstandingClientSettings` for ASP.NET Core dependency injection scenarios
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8975950Z ```
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8975954Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976118Z **1c. Update the "Next steps" section** to reference the new sample:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976122Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976202Z ```markdown
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976619Z * [Sample 16: Get usage/billing details][sample16] — Retrieve `AnalyzeUsageDetails` from a completed analyze operation
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976782Z ```
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8976787Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977086Z Add the corresponding footnote at the bottom of the README where the other `[sampleXX]` links are defined:
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977090Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977159Z ```markdown
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977652Z [sample16]: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/contentunderstanding/Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding/samples/Sample16_GetUsage.md
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977717Z ```
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977721Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977818Z ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8977822Z

2026-04-21T05:23:59.8978513Z 
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8978588Z ```csharp
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8978745Z // Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8978837Z // Licensed under the MIT License.
2026-04-21T05:23:59.8978841Z
